text:
Here is a patch to Makefile:

46,47d45
< TOUCH=                /usr/bin/touch
<
112,116d109
<
<       @cd ${WRKDIR}/apache_${VERSION_APACHE}/src \
<       && ${ECHO_MSG} "==> Configuring Apache source code" \
<       && ${TOUCH} Configuration \
<       && ./Configure
